name: Kevin Ariza Nuñez
title: Full Stack Developer
subtitle: Senior Software Engineer · +7 years of experience
bio: Full Stack Developer with more than 7 years of experience in the design, development, and optimization of scalable, high-performance web applications. My main role is to ensure business continuity through problem detection and resolution and technical support of products.
bioExtended: Throughout my career I have led development teams, designed scalable solutions, and delivered more than 70 web applications and modules that directly impact organizational productivity. I am passionate about building software that solves real problems with clean code, solid architectures, and a user experience thought out in detail.
avatarAlt: Kevin Ariza Nuñez - Full Stack Developer
